stemHtml: Complete the following sentence: Distress and urgency messages shall normally be maintained on the air-ground frequency used at the time, until _____.

options.a: Company dispatch are ready to take responsibility for and manage the situation on their specific allocated company frequency.
options.b: It is considered that better assistance can be provided by transferring that traffic to another frequency.
options.c: Search and rescue services take over responsibility for all communications in 121.5 MHz.
options.d: The flight crew members are ready to switch over to 243.0 MHz.
